infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FieldOps uses your location during active field operations to provide real-time situational awareness and create a verifiable route record.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FieldOps tracks your location during active trips only. Tracking stops when the trip ends.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FieldOps uses your camera to photograph asset conditions during inspections.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: FieldOps uses Face ID to confirm your identity when accepting work permits.
infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: FieldOps uses NFC to scan vehicle and asset tags to verify physical presence.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow FieldOps to use your location during active field operations.
